0.q: Relative to WT yield, that of Dsig8 was ~96% higher, that of Osig8 was ~50% lower, and that of Csig8 was similar, indicating that σ8 has a negative effect on avermectin production.

1.q: qRT-PCR analysis of aveR and aveA1 from WT and Dsig8 grown in FM-I at days 2 and 6 showed significantly increased aveR transcription in Dsig8 versus WT at day 6.

2.q: sav_742 encodes a direct repressor of ave structural genes; double deletion mutant Dsig8–742 showed restored aveA1 transcription compared to Dsig8.

3.q: σ8 ... directly initiating transcription of its downstream gene sav_742, which encodes a direct repressor of ave structural genes.

4.q: A series of σ8-dependent genes responsive to heat stress were identified by EMSAs, qRT-PCR and in vitro transcription experiments, indicating σ8 activates protective heat stress responses.
